desc: First trial-use release of the German Dental FHIR Profiles (R4)
title: German Dental FHIR Profiles (R4)
introduction: FHIR R4 profiles for German dental practice — procedures (BEMA/GOZ), conditions (ICD-10-GM), findings (Zahnschema/FDI), communication, and treatment plans (HKP, PAR, KFO, ZE). Built on the German FHIR base profiles (de.basisprofil.r4, KBV).
